hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\bgit commit\b'; then echo 'Running ruff before commit...'; uv run ruff check src/ tests/ verify_sources.py || { echo 'Ruff check failed — commit blocked. Fix lint errors and retry.'; exit 1; }; fi; exit 0
